name: 20ct LED Battery Operated Christmas Tree Dew Drop Lights Warm White with Silver Wire - Wondershop™
description:
Illuminate your holiday decor with a subtle, inviting glow using these LED Dew Drop String Lights Christmas Tree with Wire from Wondershop™. Powered by two AA alkaline batteries, these string lights feature cute green Christmas trees with red ornaments, white garland and white snowcapped tops lit with white LED bulbs. These lights feature three unique settings to create the perfect holiday ambiance.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
